headline: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (JPM) CEO Marianne Lake Expects 2026 Loan Growth To Exceed The Industry Average
summary: JPMorgan Chase & Co. (NYSE:JPM) carries a profit margin of 31.50% and net income of $57.05 billion (FY25), securing its place on our list of the most profitable blue chip stocks to buy according to hedge funds, with analysts seeing 7.50% upside for the stock. That financial strength comes alongside a legal win for the […]

headline: From 10% chance of success to $2 trillion market cap: SpaceX's historic IPO
summary: After its Nasdaq debut on Friday, SpaceX was the sixth most-valuable U.S. company, despite being a fraction the size by revenue of tech's megacaps.

headline: JPMorgan Backs Bezos AI Startup Prometheus To Expand Industrial AI Reach
summary: JPMorgan Chase (NYSE:JPM) is a major backer of Jeff Bezos's AI industrial startup Prometheus, joining a US$12b funding round. The deal values Prometheus at US$41b and highlights growing Wall Street interest in AI for manufacturing and engineering. This move adds fresh exposure for JPMorgan to AI driven industrial technologies beyond its core banking operations. For you as an investor, this ties a large US bank directly to a high profile AI project in the industrial space, rather than...

headline: JPMorgan Chase Is Eyeing 7% Net Interest Income Growth. Why That Goal Just Got Easier to Believe.
summary: JPMorgan Chase didn't raise its net interest income growth target after the first quarter, but it may consider it now.
